sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose: The fukui-reactivity descriptors for ferrocene were computed with the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase using charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The calculations involved the Mulliken charge scheme, with the fukui-plus descriptor (f⁺) identifying iron (Fe) as the most electrophilic site with f⁺ = 0.22885456. A live `.out` log and full calculations confirm integrity and reproducibility. Warnings regarding charge conservation symmetry (f⁺, f⁻: sum drift reports f∓:
